list.title: Select Chart
list.invalidChart: This txt is not a valid 67 chart!

tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.instructions: Hold your phone on your right hand. When "6" reaches the line, lift your left hand up and move your right hand down; when "7" reaches the line, do the opposite, lift your right hand up and put your left hand down.
tutorial.keyboardNote: If you're using a PC, press "6" and "7" on your keyboard instead. (Keyboard play will be disabled in future versions, because that's not 67)
